title: Bigger Ender Chest
description: Expands the ender chest from 27 slots to 54 slots.
body:
# Bigger Ender Chest

Bigger Ender Chest expands the vanilla ender chest from **27 slots (3 rows)** to **54 slots (6 rows)**.

It keeps vanilla behavior as intact as possible:
- Each player still has their own private ender chest
- Existing items in the original first 27 slots are preserved
- No new blocks, recipes, or commands are added
- It uses the vanilla 9x6 chest menu

## Features

- Expands ender chest storage from 3 rows to 6 rows
- Preserves existing ender chest contents
- Works on Fabric
- Supports dedicated servers
- Also works in singleplayer

## Compatibility

This project has separate files for different Minecraft version lines:


Please download the file that matches your Minecraft version.

## Server / Client

On a dedicated server, this mod is intended to work with **server-side installation only** because it uses vanilla container behavior.

That means players generally should **not need to install the mod on their client** just to use the expanded ender chest on your server.

It also works when installed in a normal singleplayer Fabric instance.

## Important Warning

If you place items in the extra slots added by this mod and then later remove the mod, those extra-slot items may no longer be accessible in vanilla.

The original first 27 slots should remain intact, but it is strongly recommended to keep backups before removing the mod from an active world.
![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/475905379e02ce6c6269c5a6e811ceba111b49b9.jpeg)

## Notes

- No custom UI textures
- No custom packets
- No gameplay changes outside ender chest size
- Designed to stay lightweight and simple
